calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner Olga Burch present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Olga Rafaelian.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Text Ruling
